# cal-handoff-check Draft

Status: draft only; not installed as a live Codex thread heartbeat.

Reason: Scott rejected visible no-work Codex heartbeat prompts. Future checking should use a silent non-thread file watcher that wakes a role thread only for concrete changed-file work.

## Goal

Create a goal to read your assigned handoff files every 5 min, if not engaged in active work.

## Checked Files

- `C:\Users\scott\Code\mojo\roles\cal\memory.md`
- `G:\My Drive\Mindshare\channels\heartbeat.md`
- `G:\My Drive\Mindshare\channels\communications.md`
- `G:\My Drive\Mindshare\channels\release-management.md`
- `G:\My Drive\Mojo\channels\pipeline.md`

## Scope

Check only for MAPS program sequencing work, blockers, approvals, Release Management decisions, Pipeline status, communications governance notices relevant to Cal, or direct Cal assignments.

## Boundaries

This draft does not authorize production actions, external communication, spending, authority expansion, Git/GitHub writes, branch changes, release actions, or autonomous runtime.

## Changelog

- 2026-06-20: Created draft heartbeat/file-watch specification for Cal without installing live thread automation.
